class="f6 mid-gray lh-copy lh-title overflow-visible db ld_AY" style="padding-bottom: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em;"><div class="dangerous-html mb3">Discover the rich and bold flavor of Cafe La Llave Dark Roast Ground Espresso Coffee, a premium blend that brings authentic Cuban-style coffee to your cup. Packaged in a convenient 10 oz can, this finely ground coffee delivers a strong, aromatic, and full-bodied espresso experience. Crafted with over 143 years of coffee tradition, our dark roast ensures consistent high quality. Its intense flavor profile is excellent for various brewing methods, including moka pots, espresso machines, and drip coffee makers. Whether preparing a traditional cafecito or a modern espresso-based drink, Cafe La Llave provides the perfect foundation. Our ground coffee's versatility allows experimentation with different brewing techniques. For a classic Cuban-style experience, use a moka pot to extract full flavor and aroma. For convenience, it works beautifully in drip coffee makers. Espresso machine owners will appreciate the consistent grind size for optimal extraction and crema formation. We're committed to sustainability and ethical sourcing, working closely with coffee farming communities to ensure responsible production. This dedication protects the environment and supports coffee farmers' livelihoods. The 10 oz can preserves freshness and flavor with an airtight seal, locking in rich aroma and preventing exposure to air and moisture. This ensures every cup maintains high standards of flavor and aroma. Cafe La Llave Dark Roast Ground Espresso Coffee is perfect for those who enjoy a strong, bold taste. It stands up well to milk and sweeteners, making it excellent for lattes, cappuccinos, and other specialty drinks. Many enthusiasts prefer it black to fully appreciate its complex flavor notes and smooth finish. Experience the bold flavor and rich aroma of Cafe La Llave. With premium quality, versatile brewing options, and commitment to sustainability, it's ideal for discerning coffee lovers who appreciate a strong, flavorful cup.</div></span></div><div class="mb3 f6 mid-gray lh-title overflow-visible db"><div class="dangerous-html mb3"></div></div><div class="ld_t ld_x bn bg-transparent dark-gray pa0 sans-serif mb3 lh-copy"><span class="ld_v"><span class="ld_Ec">info:</span><svg fill="currentColor" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="1em" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" role="presentation" style="font-size: 1rem; Llave Dark Roast Ground Espresso Coffee, a premium blend that brings authentic Cuban-style coffee to your cup. Packaged in a convenient 10 oz can, this finely ground coffee delivers a strong, aromatic, and full-bodied espresso experience.  Crafted with over 143 years of coffee tradition, our dark roast ensures consistent high quality. Its intense flavor profile is excellent for various brewing methods, including moka pots, espresso machines, and drip coffee makers. Whether preparing a traditional cafecito or a modern espresso-based drink, Cafe La Llave provides the perfect foundation.  Our ground coffee's versatility allows experimentation with different brewing techniques. For a classic Cuban-style experience, use a moka pot to extract full flavor and aroma. For convenience, it works beautifully in drip coffee makers. Espresso machine owners will appreciate the consistent grind size for optimal extraction and crema formation.  We're committed to sustainability and ethical sourcing, working closely with coffee farming communities to ensure responsible production. This dedication protects the environment and supports coffee farmers' livelihoods.  The 10 oz can preserves freshness and flavor with an airtight seal, locking in rich aroma and preventing exposure to air and moisture. This ensures every cup maintains high standards of flavor and aroma.  Cafe La Llave Dark Roast Ground Espresso Coffee is perfect for those who enjoy a strong, bold taste. It stands up well to milk and sweeteners, making it excellent for lattes, cappuccinos, and other specialty drinks. Many enthusiasts prefer it black to fully appreciate its complex flavor notes and smooth finish.  Experience the bold flavor and rich aroma of Cafe La Llave. With premium quality, versatile brewing options, and commitment to sustainability, it's ideal for discerning coffee lovers who appreciate a strong, flavorful the rich and bold flavor of Cafe La Llave Dark Roast Ground Espresso Coffee, a premium blend that brings authentic Cuban-style coffee to your cup. Packaged in a convenient 10 oz can, this finely ground coffee delivers a strong, aromatic, and full-bodied espresso experience.  Crafted with over 143 years of coffee tradition, our dark roast ensures consistent high quality. Its intense flavor profile is excellent for various brewing methods, including moka pots, espresso machines, and drip coffee makers. Whether preparing a traditional cafecito or a modern espresso-based drink, Cafe La Llave provides the perfect foundation.  Our ground coffee's versatility allows experimentation with different brewing techniques. For a classic Cuban-style experience, use a moka pot to extract full flavor and aroma. For convenience, it works beautifully in drip coffee makers. Espresso machine owners will appreciate the consistent grind size for optimal extraction and crema formation.  We're committed to sustainability and ethical sourcing, working closely with coffee farming communities to ensure responsible production. This dedication protects the environment and supports coffee farmers' livelihoods.  The 10 oz can preserves freshness and flavor with an airtight seal, locking in rich aroma and preventing exposure to air and moisture. This ensures every cup maintains high standards of flavor and aroma.  Cafe La Llave Dark Roast Ground Espresso Coffee is perfect for those who enjoy a strong, bold taste. It stands up well to milk and sweeteners, making it excellent for lattes, cappuccinos, and other specialty drinks. Many enthusiasts prefer it black to fully appreciate its complex flavor notes and smooth finish.  Experience the bold flavor and rich aroma of Cafe La Llave. With premium quality, versatile brewing options, and commitment to sustainability, it's ideal for discerning coffee lovers who appreciate a strong, flavorful cup."}}},"idml":{"arExperience":null,"genAiDetails":{"genAiDescriptionBullet":null,"genAiConciseSummary":null},"sizeCharts":null,"chokingHazards":null,"productHighlights":[{"name":"Roast type","value":"Dark","iconURL":null},{"name":"Flavor notes","value":"aromatic and robust flavor","iconURL":null},{"name":"Coffee drink type","value":"Espresso","iconURL":null},{"name":"Net content statement","value":"10 oz","iconURL":null},{"name":"Caffeine designation","value":"Naturally Caffeinated","iconURL":null},{"name":"Food form","value":"Ground","iconURL":null}],"directions":[{"name":"Instructions","value":"If you use an espresso machine, follow instructions.
